steps.title: Find the concrete example
steps.content: The student wants an example of a position in ballroom dance. The notes give exactly one named example: closed facing position.

steps.title: Avoid general statements
steps.content: Choice B says some dance positions are for partner dancing, but it names no ballroom position. Choice C says body positions matter in dance generally. Choice D says ballroom dance includes several partner positions but gives no specific example. The remaining choice identifies closed facing position as the example. The answer is A.
